title: Paris
description: A week in the City of Light, ridden like a metro line — sunrise at the Eiffel Tower, Montmartre, Le Marais, the food.
concept: The first real destination on The JccL Line. A week in Paris reimagined as a transit line: six stations, each a field note, revealed as you scroll down the rail. Field content ported from the redesign branch's paris.mdx into a self-contained static stop.
source: Ported from src/content/travel/paris.mdx (The JccL Line redesign)
